name: Entrance to Maze of Dts
description:
This is the entrance of the Wardome Maze of Dts. If you
are a player that don't like to explore and you are afraid
of DTs don't enter this zone. But if you are player that 
thinks that adventuring is most nice that zone will be
perfect to you. Don't forget that you must use your brain
a lot in this zone.
  Maze of Dts, made in Brazil, by the Wardome Mud by the
God Luigi.
